jobs.title: Data Pipeline Engineer — Wool Genomics
jobs.description: WoolWorks International is seeking a Data Pipeline Engineer to join the Genomics Data Infrastructure team. You will build and maintain ingest pipelines for whole-genome sequencing output, transforming raw bioinformatics data into structured documents loaded into MarkLogic. A key responsibility is ensuring that element-level security is correctly applied at ingest time — design specifications and cost data must remain in separate security partitions.
requirements: Experience with MarkLogic element-level security or equivalent
Attention to detail with access control configuration
